steps.command: echo 'Checking environment...' && which jq && which bash

steps.instruction: Read the environment check output from the previous step. Create a short summary file at reports/env-report.md listing the detected tool versions and paths.

steps.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs && if test -f reports/env-report.md && grep -q . reports/env-report.md; then echo 'SUCCESS' | tee .wheel/outputs/verify-report.txt; else echo 'FAILURE' | tee .wheel/outputs/verify-report.txt; fi

steps.instruction:
The workflow completed successfully. Do the following:
1. Create the directory workflows/success/ if it doesn't exist
2. Copy workflows/example.json to workflows/success/example.json
3. Write a short explanation to reports/workflow-result.md explaining that the workflow succeeded — include which steps passed and why (reference the outputs in .wheel/outputs/).

The workflow failed. Do the following:
1. Create the directory workflows/failure/ if it doesn't exist
2. Copy workflows/example.json to workflows/failure/example.json
3. Write a short explanation to reports/workflow-result.md explaining why the workflow failed — examine the step outputs in .wheel/outputs/ to identify which step failed and what went wrong.
